title: Magmaus® PDL40 [Never-Rust] Heavy Duty Waterproof Outdoor Padlock with 3 Keys - Stainless Steel - [High Security Protection] - Ideal Gate or Shed Lock
features: ANTI RUST WATERPROOF DESIGN - The body, shackle and cylinder are made using complex grade stainless steel, providing protection against harsh weather conditions all year round.
ANTI THEFT LOCK CYLINDER - The patented, high precision design makes the lock cylinder almost impossible to pick, drill and prize.
DOMESTIC & COMMERCIAL APPLICATIONS - Suitable to use as a gate or shed lock, applications where the highest level of security is required.

HOW TO USE - Ensure the rings inside the cylinder are aligned. If the rings are not aligned, use the key tip to push through the rings, until they are symmetrical. Fully insert the key through the cylinder, then rotate 180 degrees clockwise to release the shackle. Place the lock on the application of your choice, close the shackle and rotate the key 180 degrees anti-clockwise to lock. Remove the key from the cylinder.
description: Product Description Size Comparison Chart Choose the ideal lock size for your application. Magmaus PDL40 Heavy Duty Waterproof Padlock with 3 Keys. Magmaus PDE40 Heavy Duty Waterproof Padlock with 3 Keys. Magmaus PDL50 Heavy Duty Waterproof Padlock with 3 Keys. Magmaus PDE50 Heavy Duty Waterproof Padlock with 3 Keys. Magmaus PDL60 Heavy Duty Waterproof Padlock with 3 Keys. Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,522 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,522 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,522 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,522 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,522 Price £22.99 £ 22 . 99 £24.49 £ 24 . 49 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £27.99 £ 27 . 99 £28.99 £ 28 . 99 Size 40 mm 40 mm - Long Shackle 50 mm 50 mm - Long Shackle 60 mm Shackle Type Regular Regular Anti-Cut Anti-Cut Anti-Cut Shackle Diameter 7 mm 7 mm 10 mm 10 mm 12 mm Horizontal Clearance 20 mm 20 mm 23 mm 23 mm 26 mm Vertical Clearance 27 mm 45 mm 30 mm 53 mm 35 mm Magmaus is a UK based company and are glad to offer a unique and innovative padlock for containers, sheds, garages, or whatever you need to secure in a safe and reliable manner. The PDL/50 series padlock is a game-changing innovation, specially designed with an extra thick 10mm shackle , making it very secure again bolt cutters and other heavy duty tools. The heavy-duty complex grade steel attributes a mighty strength to the Magmaus padlock as it can resist a force up to 4000 Kgs , making it almost impossible to achieve by manual means. The sturdy design offers you great flexibility to use the lock for a variety of purposes, be it during the summer or winter. The lock has been placed in concentrated nitric acid for over 40 minutes and has shown to be highly resistant to rusting and corrosion . This makes it a natural choice for marine environments, especially for container owners. Magmaus is a truly remarkable company driving innovations to add value to its customers. Come and join us and enjoy this safe and reliable locking solution! RUST & CORROSION PROOF Designed for the extremes of summer and winter, the PDL50 padlock has been placed in strong nitric acid for over 40 minutes and has shown to be suitable for containers in the marine environment. Enjoy year-round protection in hot summers and freezing winters. SHOCK RESISTANT DESIGN Made from heavy-duty complex steel which is super strong and shock-resistant. SAFE AND SECURED DESIGN The patented anti-theft lock cylinder technology makes the padlock a nightmare for lock pickers. Does not open with clone keys and has been built strong enough to resist drilling, thus ensuring your peace of mind.
